200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: Unknowable Adventure
Event Date: 04/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E64
Primordial Chaos Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the fighter turns a random enemy fighter into a stone block for 3 seconds. During this time, the target cannot move and takes 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% more damage. Also, during this time, the target receives 37600 / 53800 / 76800 / 102400 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 magical damage every second. After the effect ends, the target explodes. Upon explosion, the target takes 28200 / 40300 / 57600 / 76800 / 96000 / 120000 / 150000 pure damage, and its physical and magical armor are reduced by 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 10% / 12% / 15% for 3 seconds. Additionally, 2 nearest enemy fighters are hit by stones. The stones deal 37600 / 53800 / 76800 / 102400 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 physical damage upon impact and stun for 1,5 seconds.

Enhancement: 2
11000 Armor from the gems
Once in a while, the fighter removes 2 random enemy fighters for 4 random positive effects and turns them into a stone block for 3 seconds. During this time, the targets cannot move and take 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% more damage. Also, during this time, the targets receive 56400 / 80600 / 115200 / 153600 / 192000 / 240000 / 300000 magical damage every second. After the effect ends, the targets explode. Upon explosion, they take 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 / 250000 pure damage, and their physical and magical armor is reduced by 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% for 3 seconds. Additionally, 2 nearest enemy fighters are hit by stones. The stones deal 56400 / 80600 / 115200 / 153600 / 192000 / 240000 / 300000 physical damage upon impact and stun for 2 seconds.

Enhancement: 3
22000 Armor from the gems
Once in a while, the fighter removes all positive effects from 3 random enemy fighters, turning them into a stone block for 4 seconds, and deals pure damage equal to 150% / 160% / 170% / 180% / 200% / 220% / 250% of their physical armor to all enemy fighters affected by movement restrictions, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly, or fear. The enemy fighters turned into a stone block cannot move for 4 seconds and receive 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% more damage. Also, during this time, the targets receive 75300 / 107500 / 153600 / 204800 / 256000 / 320000 / 400000 magical damage every second. After the effect ends, the targets explode. Upon explosion, they receive 65900 / 94100 / 134400 / 179200 / 224000 / 280000 / 350000 pure damage, and their physical and magical armor are reduced by 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% for 4 seconds. Additionally, 2 nearest enemy fighters are hit by stones. The stones deal 75300 / 107500 / 153600 / 204800 / 255000 / 320000 / 400000 physical damage upon impact and stun for 2,5 seconds.

Requirements:

Cooldown: 8 secs
